title: cassia neesiana var. subnitida
intro: Cassia neesiana var. subnitida, also known as the 'Yellow Cassia', is a perennial plant species native to tropical regions and is a variant of the Cassia neesiana plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. Cassia neesiana var. subnitida is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
